3329
3333 [[nodiscard]] bool isPrimitiveHidden(uint UUID) const;
3334
3336
3339 void cleanDeletedUUIDs(std::vector<uint> &UUIDs) const;
3340
3342
3345 void cleanDeletedUUIDs(std::vector<std::vector<uint>> &UUIDs) const;
3346
3348
3351 void cleanDeletedUUIDs(std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<uint>>> &UUIDs) const;
3352
3353 //-------- Primitive Data Methods ---------- //
3354
3356
3362 template<typename T>
3363 void setPrimitiveData(uint UUID, const char *label, const T &data) {
3364#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
3365 if (primitives.find(UUID) == primitives.end()) {
3366 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::setPrimitiveData): UUID of " + std::to_string(UUID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
3367 }
3368#endif
3369 // Check if this primitive already has cached data for registry maintenance
3370 std::string label_str = std::string(label);
3371 bool had_cached_value = false;
3372
3373 // Handle caching only for supported types, and avoid character arrays
3374 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
3375 if (isPrimitiveDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str) && primitives.at(UUID)->doesPrimitiveDataExist(label)) {
3376 T old_cached_value{};
3377 primitives.at(UUID)->getPrimitiveData(label, old_cached_value);
3378 decrementPrimitiveValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
3379 had_cached_value = true;
3380 }
3381 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
3382 if (isPrimitiveDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str) && primitives.at(UUID)->doesPrimitiveDataExist(label)) {
3383 std::string old_cached_value;
3384 primitives.at(UUID)->getPrimitiveData(label, old_cached_value);
3385 decrementPrimitiveValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
3386 had_cached_value = true;
3387 }
3388 }
3389
3390 if (!primitives.at(UUID)->doesPrimitiveDataExist(label)) {
3391 incrementPrimitiveDataLabelCounter(label);
3392 }
3393
3394 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type
3395 HeliosDataType data_type;
3396 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
3397 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
3398 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
3399 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
3400 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
3401 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
3402 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
3403 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
3404 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
3405 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
3406 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
3407 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
3408 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
3409 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
3410 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
3411 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
3412 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
3413 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
3414 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
3415 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
3416 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
3417 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
3418 }
3419 HeliosDataType target_type = registerOrValidatePrimitiveDataType<T>(label, data_type);
3420
3421 // Store data with type casting if needed
3422 if (target_type != data_type && isTypeCastingSupported(data_type, target_type)) {
3423 storeDataWithTypeCasting(UUID, label, data, target_type);
3424 } else {
3425 primitives.at(UUID)->setPrimitiveData(label, data);
3426 }
3427
3428 // Update value registry if caching is enabled for this label (only for new data)
3429 if (isPrimitiveDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str) && !had_cached_value) {
3430 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
3431 incrementPrimitiveValueRegistry(label_str, data);
3432 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
3433 incrementPrimitiveValueRegistry(label_str, std::string(data));
3434 }
3435 } else if (isPrimitiveDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str) && had_cached_value) {
3436 // For updates, just add the new value (old value was already decremented)
3437 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
3438 incrementPrimitiveValueRegistry(label_str, data);
3439 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
3440 incrementPrimitiveValueRegistry(label_str, std::string(data));
3441 }
3442 }
3443 }
3444
3446
3452 template<typename T>
3453 void setPrimitiveData(uint UUID, const char *label, const std::vector<T> &data) {
3454#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
3455 if (primitives.find(UUID) == primitives.end()) {
3456 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::setPrimitiveData): UUID of " + std::to_string(UUID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
3457 }
3458#endif
3459 if (!primitives.at(UUID)->doesPrimitiveDataExist(label)) {
3460 incrementPrimitiveDataLabelCounter(label);
3461 }
3462
3463 // For vector data, register the base type (not vector type)
3464 HeliosDataType data_type;
3465 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
3466 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
3467 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
3468 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
3469 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
3470 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
3471 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
3472 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
3473 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
3474 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
3475 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
3476 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
3477 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
3478 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
3479 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
3480 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
3481 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
3482 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
3483 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
3484 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
3485 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
3486 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
3487 }
3488 registerOrValidatePrimitiveDataType<T>(label, data_type);
3489
3490 primitives.at(UUID)->setPrimitiveData(label, data);
3491 }
3492
3494
3501 template<typename T>
3502 void setPrimitiveData(const std::vector<uint> &UUIDs, const char *label, const std::vector<T> &data) {
3503#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
3504 if (UUIDs.size() != data.size()) {
3505 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::setPrimitiveData): UUIDs and data vectors must be the same size.");
3506 }
3507#endif
3508
3509 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type (only once for all elements)
3510 HeliosDataType target_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UNKNOWN;
3511 if (!UUIDs.empty()) {
3512 HeliosDataType data_type;
3513 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
3514 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
3515 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
3516 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
3517 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
3518 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
3519 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
3520 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
3521 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
3522 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
3523 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
3524 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
3525 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
3526 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
3527 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
3528 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
3529 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
3530 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
3531 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
3532 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
3533 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
3534 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
3535 }
3536 target_type = registerOrValidatePrimitiveDataType<T>(label, data_type);
3537 }
3538
3539 for (uint UUID: UUIDs) {
3540#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
3541 if (primitives.find(UUID) == primitives.end()) {
3542 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::setPrimitiveData): UUID of " + std::to_string(UUID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
3543 }
3544#endif
3545 if (!primitives.at(UUID)->doesPrimitiveDataExist(label)) {
3546 incrementPrimitiveDataLabelCounter(label);
3547 }
3548 }
3549
3550#ifdef USE_OPENMP
3551#pragma omp parallel for
3552#endif
3553 for (int i = 0; i < (int) UUIDs.size(); ++i) {
3554 primitives.at(UUIDs[i])->setPrimitiveData(label, data[i]);
3555 }
3556 }
3557
3559
3565 template<typename T>
3566 void setPrimitiveData(const std::vector<uint> &UUIDs, const char *label, const T &data) {
3567
3568 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type
3569 if (!UUIDs.empty()) {
3570 HeliosDataType data_type;
3571 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
3572 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
3573 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
3574 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
3575 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
3576 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
3577 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
3578 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
3579 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
3580 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
3581 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
3582 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
3583 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
3584 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
3585 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
3586 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
3587 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
3588 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
3589 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
3590 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
3591 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
3592 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
3593 }
3594 registerOrValidatePrimitiveDataType<T>(label, data_type);
3595 }
3596
3597 for (uint UUID: UUIDs) {
3598#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
3599 if (primitives.find(UUID) == primitives.end()) {
3600 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::setPrimitiveData): UUID of " + std::to_string(UUID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
3601 }
3602#endif
3603 if (!primitives.at(UUID)->doesPrimitiveDataExist(label)) {
3604 incrementPrimitiveDataLabelCounter(label);
3605 }
3606 }
3607
3608#ifdef USE_OPENMP
3609#pragma omp parallel for
3610#endif
3611 for (int i = 0; i < (int) UUIDs.size(); ++i) {
3612 primitives.at(UUIDs[i])->setPrimitiveData(label, data);
3613 }
3614 }
3615
3617
3623 template<typename T>
3624 void getPrimitiveData(uint UUID, const char *label, T &data) const {
3625#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
3626 if (primitives.find(UUID) == primitives.end()) {
3627 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getPrimitiveData): UUID of " + std::to_string(UUID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
3628 }
3629#endif
3630 primitives.at(UUID)->getPrimitiveData(label, data);
3631 }
3632
3634
3641 template<typename T>
3642 void getPrimitiveData(uint UUID, const char *label, std::vector<T> &data) const {
3643#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
3644 if (primitives.find(UUID) == primitives.end()) {
3645 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getPrimitiveData): UUID of " + std::to_string(UUID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
3646 }
3647#endif
3648 primitives.at(UUID)->getPrimitiveData(label, data);
3649 }

4340 template<typename T>
4341 void setMaterialData(const std::string &material_label, const char *data_label, const T &data) {
4342 uint matID = getMaterialIDFromLabel(material_label);
4343 materials[matID].setMaterialData(data_label, data);
4344 }
4345
4347
4354 template<typename T>
4355 void setMaterialData(const std::string &material_label, const char *data_label, const std::vector<T> &data) {
4356 uint matID = getMaterialIDFromLabel(material_label);
4357 materials[matID].setMaterialData(data_label, data);
4358 }
4359
4361
4367 template<typename T>
4368 void getMaterialData(const std::string &material_label, const char *data_label, T &data) const {
4369 uint matID = getMaterialIDFromLabel(material_label);
4370 materials.at(matID).getMaterialData(data_label, data);
4371 }
4372
4374
4380 template<typename T>
4381 void getMaterialData(const std::string &material_label, const char *data_label, std::vector<T> &data) const {
4382 uint matID = getMaterialIDFromLabel(material_label);
4383 materials.at(matID).getMaterialData(data_label, data);
4384 }

4410
4420 template<typename T>
4421 void getDataWithMaterialFallback(uint UUID, const char *data_label, T &data) const {
4422 Primitive *prim = getPrimitivePointer_private(UUID);
4423 uint materialID = prim->materialID;
4424
4425 // First check if material has this data
4426 if (materials.find(materialID) != materials.end() && materials.at(materialID).doesMaterialDataExist(data_label)) {
4427 materials.at(materialID).getMaterialData(data_label, data);
4428 }
4429 // Otherwise check if primitive has this data
4430 else if (prim->doesPrimitiveDataExist(data_label)) {
4431 prim->getPrimitiveData(data_label, data);
4432 }
4433 // If neither has the data, throw error
4434 else {
4435 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getDataWithMaterialFallback): Data " + std::string(data_label) + " does not exist for primitive " + std::to_string(UUID) + " (neither in its material nor as primitive data).");
4436 }
4437 }
4438
4440
4444 [[nodiscard]] uint getPrimitiveMaterialID(uint UUID) const;
4445
4447
4451 [[nodiscard]] const Material &getMaterial(uint materialID) const;
4452
4454
4458 [[nodiscard]] uint getMaterialIDFromLabel(const std::string &material_label) const;
4459
4461
4464 [[nodiscard]] uint getMaterialCount() const;
4465
4466 //-------- Compound Object Data Methods ---------- //
4467
4469
4475 template<typename T>
4476 void setObjectData(uint objID, const char *label, const T &data) {
4477#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
4478 if (objects.find(objID) == objects.end()) {
4479 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::setObjectData): Object ID of " + std::to_string(objID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
4480 }
4481#endif
4482 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
4483 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>,
4484 "Context::setObjectData() was called with an unsupported type.");
4485
4486 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type
4487 HeliosDataType data_type;
4488 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
4489 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
4490 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4491 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
4492 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
4493 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
4494 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
4495 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
4496 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
4497 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
4498 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
4499 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
4500 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
4501 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
4502 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
4503 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
4504 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
4505 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
4506 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
4507 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
4508 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4509 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
4510 }
4511 registerOrValidateObjectDataType<T>(label, data_type);
4512
4513 // Check if this object already has cached data for registry maintenance
4514 std::string label_str = std::string(label);
4515 bool had_cached_value = false;
4516
4517 // Handle caching only for supported types, and avoid character arrays
4518 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4519 if (isObjectDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str) && objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4520 T old_cached_value{};
4521 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, old_cached_value);
4522 decrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
4523 had_cached_value = true;
4524 }
4525 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4526 if (isObjectDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str) && objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4527 std::string old_cached_value;
4528 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, old_cached_value);
4529 decrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
4530 had_cached_value = true;
4531 }
4532 }
4533
4534 if (!objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4535 incrementObjectDataLabelCounter(label);
4536 }
4537 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, data);
4538
4539 // Update value registry if caching is enabled for this label (only for new data)
4540 if (isObjectDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str) && !had_cached_value) {
4541 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4542 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, data);
4543 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4544 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, std::string(data));
4545 }
4546 } else if (isObjectDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str) && had_cached_value) {
4547 // For updates, just add the new value (old value was already decremented)
4548 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4549 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, data);
4550 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4551 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, std::string(data));
4552 }
4553 }
4554 }
4555
4557
4563 template<typename T>
4564 void setObjectData(const std::vector<uint> &objIDs, const char *label, const T &data) {
4565 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
4566 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>,
4567 "Context::setObjectData() was called with an unsupported type.");
4568
4569 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type
4570 if (!objIDs.empty()) {
4571 HeliosDataType data_type;
4572 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
4573 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
4574 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4575 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
4576 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
4577 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
4578 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
4579 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
4580 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
4581 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
4582 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
4583 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
4584 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
4585 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
4586 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
4587 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
4588 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
4589 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
4590 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
4591 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
4592 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4593 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
4594 }
4595 registerOrValidateObjectDataType<T>(label, data_type);
4596 }
4597
4598 // Check if caching is enabled for this label
4599 std::string label_str = std::string(label);
4600 bool caching_enabled = isObjectDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str);
4601
4602 // For caching, we need to handle old values before setting new ones (cannot parallelize this part)
4603 if (caching_enabled) {
4604 // Handle caching only for supported types
4605 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4606 for (uint objID: objIDs) {
4607 if (objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4608 T old_cached_value{};
4609 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, old_cached_value);
4610 decrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
4611 }
4612 }
4613 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4614 for (uint objID: objIDs) {
4615 if (objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4616 std::string old_cached_value;
4617 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, old_cached_value);
4618 decrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
4619 }
4620 }
4621 }
4622 }
4623
4624 // Count new data labels
4625 for (uint objID: objIDs) {
4626 if (!objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4627 incrementObjectDataLabelCounter(label);
4628 }
4629 }
4630
4631#ifdef USE_OPENMP
4632#pragma omp parallel for
4633#endif
4634 for (int i = 0; i < (int) objIDs.size(); ++i) {
4635 objects.at(objIDs[i])->setObjectData(label, data);
4636 }
4637
4638 // Update value registry if caching is enabled (increment the new value for all objects)
4639 if (caching_enabled) {
4640 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4641 // Increment the new value once for each object that received it
4642 for (size_t i = 0; i < objIDs.size(); ++i) {
4643 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, data);
4644 }
4645 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4646 // Increment the new value once for each object that received it
4647 for (size_t i = 0; i < objIDs.size(); ++i) {
4648 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, std::string(data));
4649 }
4650 }
4651 }
4652 }
4653
4655
4661 template<typename T>
4662 void setObjectData(const std::vector<std::vector<uint>> &objIDs, const char *label, const T &data) {
4663 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
4664 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>,
4665 "Context::setObjectData() was called with an unsupported type.");
4666
4667 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type
4668 if (!objIDs.empty() && !objIDs[0].empty()) {
4669 HeliosDataType data_type;
4670 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
4671 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
4672 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4673 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
4674 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
4675 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
4676 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
4677 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
4678 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
4679 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
4680 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
4681 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
4682 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
4683 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
4684 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
4685 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
4686 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
4687 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
4688 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
4689 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
4690 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4691 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
4692 }
4693 registerOrValidateObjectDataType<T>(label, data_type);
4694 }
4695
4696 // Check if caching is enabled for this label
4697 std::string label_str = std::string(label);
4698 bool caching_enabled = isObjectDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str);
4699 size_t total_objects = 0;
4700
4701 // For caching, we need to handle old values before setting new ones (cannot parallelize this part)
4702 if (caching_enabled) {
4703 // Handle caching only for supported types
4704 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4705 for (const auto &j: objIDs) {
4706 for (uint objID: j) {
4707 total_objects++;
4708 if (objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4709 T old_cached_value{};
4710 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, old_cached_value);
4711 decrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
4712 }
4713 }
4714 }
4715 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4716 for (const auto &j: objIDs) {
4717 for (uint objID: j) {
4718 total_objects++;
4719 if (objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4720 std::string old_cached_value;
4721 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, old_cached_value);
4722 decrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
4723 }
4724 }
4725 }
4726 }
4727 } else {
4728 // Count total objects for later cache increment
4729 for (const auto &j: objIDs) {
4730 total_objects += j.size();
4731 }
4732 }
4733
4734 for (const auto &j: objIDs) {
4735 for (uint objID: j) {
4736 if (!objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4737 incrementObjectDataLabelCounter(label);
4738 }
4739 }
4740 }
4741
4742#ifdef USE_OPENMP
4743#pragma omp parallel for
4744#endif
4745 for (int j = 0; j < (int) objIDs.size(); ++j) {
4746 for (size_t i = 0; i < objIDs[j].size(); ++i) {
4747 objects.at(objIDs[j][i])->setObjectData(label, data);
4748 }
4749 }
4750
4751 // Update value registry if caching is enabled (increment the new value for all objects)
4752 if (caching_enabled) {
4753 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4754 // Increment the new value once for each object that received it
4755 for (size_t i = 0; i < total_objects; ++i) {
4756 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, data);
4757 }
4758 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4759 // Increment the new value once for each object that received it
4760 for (size_t i = 0; i < total_objects; ++i) {
4761 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, std::string(data));
4762 }
4763 }
4764 }
4765 }
4766
4768
4774 template<typename T>
4775 void setObjectData(const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<uint>>> &objIDs, const char *label, const T &data) {
4776 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
4777 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>,
4778 "Context::setObjectData() was called with an unsupported type.");
4779
4780 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type
4781 if (!objIDs.empty() && !objIDs[0].empty() && !objIDs[0][0].empty()) {
4782 HeliosDataType data_type;
4783 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
4784 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
4785 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4786 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
4787 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
4788 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
4789 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
4790 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
4791 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
4792 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
4793 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
4794 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
4795 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
4796 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
4797 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
4798 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
4799 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
4800 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
4801 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
4802 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
4803 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4804 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
4805 }
4806 registerOrValidateObjectDataType<T>(label, data_type);
4807 }
4808
4809 // Check if caching is enabled for this label
4810 std::string label_str = std::string(label);
4811 bool caching_enabled = isObjectDataValueCachingEnabled(label_str);
4812 size_t total_objects = 0;
4813
4814 // For caching, we need to handle old values before setting new ones (cannot parallelize this part)
4815 if (caching_enabled) {
4816 // Handle caching only for supported types
4817 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4818 for (const auto &k: objIDs) {
4819 for (const auto &j: k) {
4820 for (uint objID: j) {
4821 total_objects++;
4822 if (objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4823 T old_cached_value{};
4824 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, old_cached_value);
4825 decrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
4826 }
4827 }
4828 }
4829 }
4830 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4831 for (const auto &k: objIDs) {
4832 for (const auto &j: k) {
4833 for (uint objID: j) {
4834 total_objects++;
4835 if (objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4836 std::string old_cached_value;
4837 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, old_cached_value);
4838 decrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, old_cached_value);
4839 }
4840 }
4841 }
4842 }
4843 }
4844 } else {
4845 // Count total objects for later cache increment
4846 for (const auto &k: objIDs) {
4847 for (const auto &j: k) {
4848 total_objects += j.size();
4849 }
4850 }
4851 }
4852
4853 for (const auto &k: objIDs) {
4854 for (const auto &j: k) {
4855 for (uint objID: j) {
4856 if (!objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4857 incrementObjectDataLabelCounter(label);
4858 }
4859 }
4860 }
4861 }
4862
4863#ifdef USE_OPENMP
4864#pragma omp parallel for
4865#endif
4866 for (int k = 0; k < (int) objIDs.size(); ++k) {
4867 for (size_t j = 0; j < objIDs[k].size(); ++j) {
4868 for (size_t i = 0; i < objIDs[k][j].size(); ++i) {
4869 uint objID = objIDs[k][j][i];
4870 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, data);
4871 }
4872 }
4873 }
4874
4875 // Update value registry if caching is enabled (increment the new value for all objects)
4876 if (caching_enabled) {
4877 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4878 // Increment the new value once for each object that received it
4879 for (size_t i = 0; i < total_objects; ++i) {
4880 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, data);
4881 }
4882 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4883 // Increment the new value once for each object that received it
4884 for (size_t i = 0; i < total_objects; ++i) {
4885 incrementObjectValueRegistry(label_str, std::string(data));
4886 }
4887 }
4888 }
4889 }
4890
4892
4899 template<typename T>
4900 void setObjectData(uint objID, const char *label, const std::vector<T> &data) {
4901#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
4902 if (objects.find(objID) == objects.end()) {
4903 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::setObjectData): Object ID of " + std::to_string(objID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
4904 }
4905#endif
4906 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
4907 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>,
4908 "Context::setObjectData() was called with an unsupported type.");
4909
4910 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type
4911 HeliosDataType data_type;
4912 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
4913 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
4914 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4915 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
4916 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
4917 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
4918 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
4919 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
4920 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
4921 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
4922 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
4923 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
4924 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
4925 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
4926 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
4927 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
4928 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
4929 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
4930 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
4931 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
4932 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4933 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
4934 }
4935 registerOrValidateObjectDataType<T>(label, data_type);
4936
4937 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, data);
4938 }
4939
4941
4948 template<typename T>
4949 void setObjectData(const std::vector<uint> &objIDs, const char *label, const std::vector<T> &data) {
4950#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
4951 if (objIDs.size() != data.size()) {
4952 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::setObjectData): Object IDs and data vectors must be the same size.");
4953 }
4954#endif
4955 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
4956 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>,
4957 "Context::setObjectData() was called with an unsupported type.");
4958
4959 // Validate data type consistency and register/validate type
4960 if (!objIDs.empty()) {
4961 HeliosDataType data_type;
4962 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
4963 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
4964 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
4965 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
4966 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
4967 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
4968 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
4969 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
4970 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
4971 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
4972 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
4973 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
4974 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
4975 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
4976 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
4977 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
4978 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
4979 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
4980 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
4981 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
4982 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
4983 data_type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
4984 }
4985 registerOrValidateObjectDataType<T>(label, data_type);
4986 }
4987
4988 for (uint objID: objIDs) {
4989 if (!objects.at(objID)->doesObjectDataExist(label)) {
4990 incrementObjectDataLabelCounter(label);
4991 }
4992 }
4993
4994#ifdef USE_OPENMP
4995#pragma omp parallel for
4996#endif
4997 for (int i = 0; i < (int) objIDs.size(); ++i) {
4998 objects.at(objIDs[i])->setObjectData(label, data[i]);
4999 }
5000 }
5001
5003
5010 void setObjectDataFromPrimitiveDataMean(uint objID, const std::string &label);
5011
5013
5019 template<typename T>
5020 void getObjectData(uint objID, const char *label, T &data) const {
5021#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
5022 if (objects.find(objID) == objects.end()) {
5023 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getObjectData): Object ID of " + std::to_string(objID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
5024 }
5025#endif
5026 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
5027 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>,
5028 "Context::getObjectData() was called with an unsupported type.");
5029 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, data);
5030 }
5031
5033
5040 template<typename T>
5041 void getObjectData(uint objID, const char *label, std::vector<T> &data) const {
5042#ifdef HELIOS_DEBUG
5043 if (objects.find(objID) == objects.end()) {
5044 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getObjectData): Object ID of " + std::to_string(objID) + " does not exist in the Context.");
5045 }
5046#endif
5047 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
5048 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>,
5049 "Context::getObjectData() was called with an unsupported type.");
5050 objects.at(objID)->getObjectData(label, data);
5051 }
5052
5054
5060 [[deprecated]]
5061 HeliosDataType getObjectDataType(uint objID, const char *label) const;
5062
5064
5070 HeliosDataType getObjectDataType(const char *label) const;
5071
5073
5078 uint getObjectDataSize(uint objID, const char *label) const;
5079
5081
5086 bool doesObjectDataExist(uint objID, const char *label) const;
5087
5089
5093 void clearObjectData(uint objID, const char *label);
5094
5096
5100 void clearObjectData(const std::vector<uint> &objIDs, const char *label);
5101
5103
5106 [[nodiscard]] std::vector<std::string> listAllObjectDataLabels() const;
5107
5109
5113 [[nodiscard]] bool areObjectPrimitivesComplete(uint objID) const;
5114
5116
5119 void cleanDeletedObjectIDs(std::vector<uint> &objIDs) const;
5120
5122
5125 void cleanDeletedObjectIDs(std::vector<std::vector<uint>> &objIDs) const;
5126
5128
5131 void cleanDeletedObjectIDs(std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<uint>>> &objIDs) const;
5132
5133 //-------- Global Data Methods ---------- //
5134
5136
5140 template<typename T>
5141 void setGlobalData(const char *label, const T &data) {
5142 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
5143 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *> || std::is_same_v<T, bool>,
5144 "Context::setGlobalData() was called with an unsupported type.");
5145
5146 globaldata[label].size = 1;
5147 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
5148 globaldata[label].global_data_int = {data};
5149 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
5150 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
5151 globaldata[label].global_data_uint = {data};
5152 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
5153 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
5154 globaldata[label].global_data_float = {data};
5155 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
5156 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
5157 globaldata[label].global_data_double = {data};
5158 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
5159 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
5160 globaldata[label].global_data_vec2 = {data};
5161 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
5162 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
5163 globaldata[label].global_data_vec3 = {data};
5164 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
5165 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
5166 globaldata[label].global_data_vec4 = {data};
5167 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
5168 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
5169 globaldata[label].global_data_int2 = {data};
5170 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
5171 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
5172 globaldata[label].global_data_int3 = {data};
5173 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
5174 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
5175 globaldata[label].global_data_int4 = {data};
5176 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
5177 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
5178 globaldata[label].global_data_string = {data};
5179 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
5180 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, bool>) {
5181 globaldata[label].global_data_bool = {data};
5182 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_BOOL;
5183 }
5184 globaldata[label].version++;
5185 }
5186
5188
5192 template<typename T>
5193 void setGlobalData(const char *label, const std::vector<T> &data) {
5194 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
5195 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *> || std::is_same_v<T, bool>,
5196 "Context::setGlobalData() was called with an unsupported type.");
5197
5198 globaldata[label].size = data.size();
5199 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
5200 globaldata[label].global_data_int = data;
5201 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT;
5202 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
5203 globaldata[label].global_data_uint = data;
5204 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_UINT;
5205 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
5206 globaldata[label].global_data_float = data;
5207 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT;
5208 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
5209 globaldata[label].global_data_double = data;
5210 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE;
5211 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
5212 globaldata[label].global_data_vec2 = data;
5213 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2;
5214 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
5215 globaldata[label].global_data_vec3 = data;
5216 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3;
5217 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
5218 globaldata[label].global_data_vec4 = data;
5219 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4;
5220 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
5221 globaldata[label].global_data_int2 = data;
5222 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT2;
5223 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
5224 globaldata[label].global_data_int3 = data;
5225 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT3;
5226 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
5227 globaldata[label].global_data_int4 = data;
5228 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_INT4;
5229 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
5230 globaldata[label].global_data_string = data;
5231 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_STRING;
5232 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, bool>) {
5233 globaldata[label].global_data_bool = data;
5234 globaldata[label].type = HELIOS_TYPE_BOOL;
5235 }
5236 globaldata[label].version++;
5237 }
5238
5240
5244 template<typename T>
5245 void getGlobalData(const char *label, T &data) const {
5246 // Use SFINAE to detect if T is std::vector<U> for some U
5247 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<int>>) {
5248 // Vector case for int
5249 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT) {
5250 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_int;
5251 } else {
5252 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type int, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type int.");
5253 }
5254 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<uint>>) {
5255 // Vector case for uint
5256 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_UINT) {
5257 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_uint;
5258 } else {
5259 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type uint, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type uint.");
5260 }
5261 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<float>>) {
5262 // Vector case for float
5263 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT) {
5264 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_float;
5265 } else {
5266 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type float, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type float.");
5267 }
5268 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<double>>) {
5269 // Vector case for double
5270 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE) {
5271 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_double;
5272 } else {
5273 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type double, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type double.");
5274 }
5275 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<vec2>>) {
5276 // Vector case for vec2
5277 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2) {
5278 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_vec2;
5279 } else {
5280 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type vec2, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type vec2.");
5281 }
5282 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<vec3>>) {
5283 // Vector case for vec3
5284 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3) {
5285 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_vec3;
5286 } else {
5287 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type vec3, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type vec3.");
5288 }
5289 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<vec4>>) {
5290 // Vector case for vec4
5291 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4) {
5292 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_vec4;
5293 } else {
5294 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type vec4, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type vec4.");
5295 }
5296 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<int2>>) {
5297 // Vector case for int2
5298 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT2) {
5299 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_int2;
5300 } else {
5301 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type int2, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type int2.");
5302 }
5303 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<int3>>) {
5304 // Vector case for int3
5305 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT3) {
5306 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_int3;
5307 } else {
5308 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type int3, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type int3.");
5309 }
5310 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<int4>>) {
5311 // Vector case for int4
5312 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT4) {
5313 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_int4;
5314 } else {
5315 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type int4, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type int4.");
5316 }
5317 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<std::string>>) {
5318 // Vector case for string
5319 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_STRING) {
5320 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_string;
5321 } else {
5322 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type string, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type string.");
5323 }
5324 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
5325 // Scalar case for int
5326 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT) {
5327 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_int.front();
5328 } else {
5329 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type int, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type int.");
5330 }
5331 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
5332 // Scalar case for uint
5333 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_UINT) {
5334 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_uint.front();
5335 } else {
5336 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type uint, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type uint.");
5337 }
5338 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, float>) {
5339 // Scalar case for float
5340 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT) {
5341 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_float.front();
5342 } else {
5343 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type float, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type float.");
5344 }
5345 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
5346 // Scalar case for double
5347 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE) {
5348 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_double.front();
5349 } else {
5350 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type double, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type double.");
5351 }
5352 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec2>) {
5353 // Scalar case for vec2
5354 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_VEC2) {
5355 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_vec2.front();
5356 } else {
5357 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type vec2, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type vec2.");
5358 }
5359 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec3>) {
5360 // Scalar case for vec3
5361 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_VEC3) {
5362 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_vec3.front();
5363 } else {
5364 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type vec3, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type vec3.");
5365 }
5366 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, vec4>) {
5367 // Scalar case for vec4
5368 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_VEC4) {
5369 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_vec4.front();
5370 } else {
5371 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type vec4, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type vec4.");
5372 }
5373 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int2>) {
5374 // Scalar case for int2
5375 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT2) {
5376 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_int2.front();
5377 } else {
5378 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type int2, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type int2.");
5379 }
5380 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int3>) {
5381 // Scalar case for int3
5382 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT3) {
5383 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_int3.front();
5384 } else {
5385 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type int3, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type int3.");
5386 }
5387 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int4>) {
5388 // Scalar case for int4
5389 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT4) {
5390 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_int4.front();
5391 } else {
5392 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type int4, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type int4.");
5393 }
5394 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
5395 // Scalar case for string
5396 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_STRING) {
5397 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_string.front();
5398 } else {
5399 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type string, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type string.");
5400 }
5401 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, bool>) {
5402 // Scalar case for bool
5403 if (globaldata.at(label).type == HELIOS_TYPE_BOOL) {
5404 data = globaldata.at(label).global_data_bool.front();
5405 } else {
5406 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getGlobalData): Attempted to get data for type bool, but data " + std::string(label) + " does not have type bool.");
5407 }
5408 } else {
5409 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double> || std::is_same_v<T, vec2> || std::is_same_v<T, vec3> || std::is_same_v<T, vec4> || std::is_same_v<T, int2> ||
5410 std::is_same_v<T, int3> || std::is_same_v<T, int4> || std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *> ||
5411 std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<int>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<uint>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<float>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<double>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<vec2>> ||
5412 std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<vec3>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<vec4>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<int2>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<int3>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<int4>> ||
5413 std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<std::string>> || std::is_same_v<T, std::vector<bool>>,
5414 "CompoundObject::getGlobalData() was called with an unsupported type.");
5415 }
5416 }

7664
7665 // ---------- Template method implementations for data type consistency ---------- //
7666
7667 template<typename T>
7668 void storeDataWithTypeCasting(uint UUID, const char *label, const T &data, HeliosDataType target_type) {
7669 // Only cast between numeric scalar types
7670 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
7671 if (target_type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT) {
7672 primitives.at(UUID)->setPrimitiveData(label, static_cast<int>(data));
7673 } else if (target_type == HELIOS_TYPE_UINT) {
7674 primitives.at(UUID)->setPrimitiveData(label, static_cast<uint>(data));
7675 } else if (target_type == HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT) {
7676 primitives.at(UUID)->setPrimitiveData(label, static_cast<float>(data));
7677 } else if (target_type == HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE) {
7678 primitives.at(UUID)->setPrimitiveData(label, static_cast<double>(data));
7679 } else {
7680 // Fallback: store as original type
7681 primitives.at(UUID)->setPrimitiveData(label, data);
7682 }
7683 } else {
7684 // For non-numeric types, store as-is
7685 primitives.at(UUID)->setPrimitiveData(label, data);
7686 }
7687 }
7688
7689 template<typename T>
7690 void storeObjectDataWithTypeCasting(uint objID, const char *label, const T &data, HeliosDataType target_type) {
7691 // Only cast between numeric scalar types
7692 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint> || std::is_same_v<T, float> || std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
7693 if (target_type == HELIOS_TYPE_INT) {
7694 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, static_cast<int>(data));
7695 } else if (target_type == HELIOS_TYPE_UINT) {
7696 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, static_cast<uint>(data));
7697 } else if (target_type == HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT) {
7698 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, static_cast<float>(data));
7699 } else if (target_type == HELIOS_TYPE_DOUBLE) {
7700 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, static_cast<double>(data));
7701 } else {
7702 // Fallback: store as original type
7703 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, data);
7704 }
7705 } else {
7706 // For non-numeric types, store as-is
7707 objects.at(objID)->setObjectData(label, data);
7708 }
7709 }
7710
7711 template<typename T>
7712 HeliosDataType registerOrValidatePrimitiveDataType(const std::string &label, HeliosDataType data_type) {
7713 auto it = primitive_data_type_registry.find(label);
7714 if (it == primitive_data_type_registry.end()) {
7715 // First time this label is used - register the type
7716 primitive_data_type_registry[label] = data_type;
7717 return data_type;
7718 } else {
7719 // Label exists - check for type consistency
7720 HeliosDataType expected_type = it->second;
7721 if (expected_type != data_type) {
7722 // Types don't match - check if casting is possible
7723 if (!isTypeCastingSupported(data_type, expected_type)) {
7724 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::registerOrValidatePrimitiveDataType): Data type mismatch for label '" + label + "'. Expected " + dataTypeToString(expected_type) + " but got " + dataTypeToString(data_type) +
7725 ". Type casting between these types is not supported.");
7726 } else {
7727 std::cerr << "WARNING (Context::registerOrValidatePrimitiveDataType): Type casting from " + dataTypeToString(data_type) + " to " + dataTypeToString(expected_type) + " for label '" + label +
7728 "'. Consider using consistent types."
7729 << std::endl;
7730 }
7731 }
7732 return expected_type;
7733 }
7734 }
7735
7736 template<typename T>
7737 HeliosDataType registerOrValidateObjectDataType(const std::string &label, HeliosDataType data_type) {
7738 auto it = object_data_type_registry.find(label);
7739 if (it == object_data_type_registry.end()) {
7740 // First time this label is used - register the type
7741 object_data_type_registry[label] = data_type;
7742 return data_type;
7743 } else {
7744 // Label exists - check for type consistency
7745 HeliosDataType expected_type = it->second;
7746 if (expected_type != data_type) {
7747 // Types don't match - check if casting is possible
7748 if (!isTypeCastingSupported(data_type, expected_type)) {
7749 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::registerOrValidateObjectDataType): Data type mismatch for label '" + label + "'. Expected " + dataTypeToString(expected_type) + " but got " + dataTypeToString(data_type) +
7750 ". Type casting between these types is not supported.");
7751 } else {
7752 std::cerr << "WARNING (Context::registerOrValidateObjectDataType): Type casting from " + dataTypeToString(data_type) + " to " + dataTypeToString(expected_type) + " for label '" + label + "'. Consider using consistent types."
7753 << std::endl;
7754 }
7755 }
7756 return expected_type;
7757 }
7758 }
7759
7760 //----------- TEMPLATE METHOD IMPLEMENTATIONS FOR VALUE REGISTRY ----------//
7761
7763 template<typename T>
7764 void incrementPrimitiveValueRegistry(const std::string &label, const T &value) {
7765 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
7766 std::string string_value = (std::is_same_v<T, std::string>) ? value : std::string(value);
7767 primitive_string_value_registry[label][string_value]++;
7768 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
7769 primitive_int_value_registry[label][value]++;
7770 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
7771 primitive_uint_value_registry[label][value]++;
7772 }
7773 }
7774
7776 template<typename T>
7777 void decrementPrimitiveValueRegistry(const std::string &label, const T &value) {
7778 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
7779 std::string string_value = (std::is_same_v<T, std::string>) ? value : std::string(value);
7780 auto label_it = primitive_string_value_registry.find(label);
7781 if (label_it != primitive_string_value_registry.end()) {
7782 auto value_it = label_it->second.find(string_value);
7783 if (value_it != label_it->second.end() && value_it->second > 0) {
7784 value_it->second--;
7785 if (value_it->second == 0) {
7786 label_it->second.erase(value_it);
7787 if (label_it->second.empty()) {
7788 primitive_string_value_registry.erase(label_it);
7789 }
7790 }
7791 }
7792 }
7793 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
7794 auto label_it = primitive_int_value_registry.find(label);
7795 if (label_it != primitive_int_value_registry.end()) {
7796 auto value_it = label_it->second.find(value);
7797 if (value_it != label_it->second.end() && value_it->second > 0) {
7798 value_it->second--;
7799 if (value_it->second == 0) {
7800 label_it->second.erase(value_it);
7801 if (label_it->second.empty()) {
7802 primitive_int_value_registry.erase(label_it);
7803 }
7804 }
7805 }
7806 }
7807 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
7808 auto label_it = primitive_uint_value_registry.find(label);
7809 if (label_it != primitive_uint_value_registry.end()) {
7810 auto value_it = label_it->second.find(value);
7811 if (value_it != label_it->second.end() && value_it->second > 0) {
7812 value_it->second--;
7813 if (value_it->second == 0) {
7814 label_it->second.erase(value_it);
7815 if (label_it->second.empty()) {
7816 primitive_uint_value_registry.erase(label_it);
7817 }
7818 }
7819 }
7820 }
7821 }
7822 }
7823
7825 template<typename T>
7826 void incrementObjectValueRegistry(const std::string &label, const T &value) {
7827 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
7828 std::string string_value = (std::is_same_v<T, std::string>) ? value : std::string(value);
7829 object_string_value_registry[label][string_value]++;
7830 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
7831 object_int_value_registry[label][value]++;
7832 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
7833 object_uint_value_registry[label][value]++;
7834 }
7835 }
7836
7838 template<typename T>
7839 void decrementObjectValueRegistry(const std::string &label, const T &value) {
7840 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, const char *> || std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, char *>) {
7841 std::string string_value = (std::is_same_v<T, std::string>) ? value : std::string(value);
7842 auto label_it = object_string_value_registry.find(label);
7843 if (label_it != object_string_value_registry.end()) {
7844 auto value_it = label_it->second.find(string_value);
7845 if (value_it != label_it->second.end() && value_it->second > 0) {
7846 value_it->second--;
7847 if (value_it->second == 0) {
7848 label_it->second.erase(value_it);
7849 if (label_it->second.empty()) {
7850 object_string_value_registry.erase(label_it);
7851 }
7852 }
7853 }
7854 }
7855 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
7856 auto label_it = object_int_value_registry.find(label);
7857 if (label_it != object_int_value_registry.end()) {
7858 auto value_it = label_it->second.find(value);
7859 if (value_it != label_it->second.end() && value_it->second > 0) {
7860 value_it->second--;
7861 if (value_it->second == 0) {
7862 label_it->second.erase(value_it);
7863 if (label_it->second.empty()) {
7864 object_int_value_registry.erase(label_it);
7865 }
7866 }
7867 }
7868 }
7869 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
7870 auto label_it = object_uint_value_registry.find(label);
7871 if (label_it != object_uint_value_registry.end()) {
7872 auto value_it = label_it->second.find(value);
7873 if (value_it != label_it->second.end() && value_it->second > 0) {
7874 value_it->second--;
7875 if (value_it->second == 0) {
7876 label_it->second.erase(value_it);
7877 if (label_it->second.empty()) {
7878 object_uint_value_registry.erase(label_it);
7879 }
7880 }
7881 }
7882 }
7883 }
7884 }
7885
7886 //----------- UNIQUE VALUE QUERY METHODS ----------//
7887
7889
7895 template<typename T>
7896 void getUniquePrimitiveDataValues(const std::string &label, std::vector<T> &values) const {
7897 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>, "getUniquePrimitiveDataValues() only supports std::string, int, and uint types.");
7898
7899 if (!isPrimitiveDataValueCachingEnabled(label)) {
7900 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getUniquePrimitiveDataValues): Value-level caching is not enabled for primitive data label '" + label + "'. Use enablePrimitiveDataValueCaching() first.");
7901 }
7902
7903 values.clear();
7904
7905 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string>) {
7906 auto it = primitive_string_value_registry.find(label);
7907 if (it != primitive_string_value_registry.end()) {
7908 values.reserve(it->second.size());
7909 for (const auto &[value, count]: it->second) {
7910 if (count > 0) {
7911 values.push_back(value);
7912 }
7913 }
7914 }
7915 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
7916 auto it = primitive_int_value_registry.find(label);
7917 if (it != primitive_int_value_registry.end()) {
7918 values.reserve(it->second.size());
7919 for (const auto &[value, count]: it->second) {
7920 if (count > 0) {
7921 values.push_back(value);
7922 }
7923 }
7924 }
7925 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
7926 auto it = primitive_uint_value_registry.find(label);
7927 if (it != primitive_uint_value_registry.end()) {
7928 values.reserve(it->second.size());
7929 for (const auto &[value, count]: it->second) {
7930 if (count > 0) {
7931 values.push_back(value);
7932 }
7933 }
7934 }
7935 }
7936 }
7937
7939
7945 template<typename T>
7946 void getUniqueObjectDataValues(const std::string &label, std::vector<T> &values) const {
7947 static_assert(std::is_same_v<T, std::string> || std::is_same_v<T, int> || std::is_same_v<T, uint>, "getUniqueObjectDataValues() only supports std::string, int, and uint types.");
7948
7949 if (!isObjectDataValueCachingEnabled(label)) {
7950 helios_runtime_error("ERROR (Context::getUniqueObjectDataValues): Value-level caching is not enabled for object data label '" + label + "'. Use enableObjectDataValueCaching() first.");
7951 }
7952
7953 values.clear();
7954
7955 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, std::string>) {
7956 auto it = object_string_value_registry.find(label);
7957 if (it != object_string_value_registry.end()) {
7958 values.reserve(it->second.size());
7959 for (const auto &[value, count]: it->second) {
7960 if (count > 0) {
7961 values.push_back(value);
7962 }
7963 }
7964 }
7965 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) {
7966 auto it = object_int_value_registry.find(label);
7967 if (it != object_int_value_registry.end()) {
7968 values.reserve(it->second.size());
7969 for (const auto &[value, count]: it->second) {
7970 if (count > 0) {
7971 values.push_back(value);
7972 }
7973 }
7974 }
7975 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, uint>) {
7976 auto it = object_uint_value_registry.find(label);
7977 if (it != object_uint_value_registry.end()) {
7978 values.reserve(it->second.size());
7979 for (const auto &[value, count]: it->second) {
7980 if (count > 0) {
7981 values.push_back(value);
7982 }
7983 }
7984 }
7985 }
7986 }
7987 };
7988
7989} // namespace helios
